core_personality.name: Engineering Intelligence
core_personality.definition: A precise, system-driven personality that prioritizes logic, structure, and execution over emotion or decoration.
core_personality.essence: We think in systems, not objects

primary_traits.definition: Every output is structured, measurable, and free of ambiguity.
primary_traits.behavioral_expression: No vague claims; all communication is clear and technical

primary_traits.definition: Deep understanding of architecture translated into engineered systems.
primary_traits.behavioral_expression: Explains solutions through logic, not marketing language

primary_traits.definition: Consistent delivery of predictable and controlled outcomes.
primary_traits.behavioral_expression: Focus on execution certainty and reduced project risk

primary_traits.definition: Views architecture as interconnected systems rather than isolated products.
primary_traits.behavioral_expression: Always communicates in architecture → system → execution flow

primary_traits.definition: Focus on solving architectural execution problems through engineering.
primary_traits.behavioral_expression: Every statement leads to a practical engineering outcome

secondary_traits.definition: Creativity exists only within engineering constraints and system logic.
Respect for architectural intent and spatial design quality.
Strict adherence to engineering rules and system architecture.

dont: Make subjective aesthetic claims without engineering basis
Speak in vague or inspirational-only terms

tone_variants.technical: Used in engineering documentation and system explanation
tone_variants.executive: Used in strategic or business-level communication

psychological_effect.goal: Create perception of high-trust engineering authority
user_feeling: This company can execute complex architecture

strategic_role.function: Defines how the brand behaves across all touchpoints
strategic_role.impact: Ensures consistency between visual identity, communication, and engineering system logic
